title: trachymene ornata
intro: Trachymene ornata, also known as Coast Spurge or Bead Flower, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Trachymene ornata include the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. Trachymene ornata can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine in Australia.
